sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toMonth(event_date) AS month FROM test_dates WHERE month = 4;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = event_date + INTERVAL 1 MONTH WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toMonth(toDateTime(event_date)) AS month FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < '2023-07-01';
